title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement link
scenario: Onboarding EULA page License Agreement link directs user to the latest HP software license agreement URL
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Observe the onboarding flow and navigate to the EULA (End User License Agreement) page.
3. Tap the "License Agreement" link displayed on the EULA page.
4. Observe the resulting page that opens.
expected: The user is directed to the License Agreement page at the URL: https://www.hp.com/go/sweula
